finding: The deployment workflow security audit existed as tested source but was not independently enforced when the workflow or its audit logic changed.

behavior: Runs on changes to the deployment workflow or security-audit implementation and can also be manually dispatched.
Executes the existing fail-closed deployment-workflow audit tests.
Audits the committed Cloudflare deployment workflow and emits a JSON artifact.
Uses read-only repository permission and accesses no Cloudflare credentials.
Contains no deployment, Vercel, payment, billing, or conversion behavior.

evidence_strength: deterministic static contract verification; committed source; no hosted-run evidence yet
privacy_boundary: No secret values, private chat, health information, credentials, or identifying personal material were read or persisted.
limits: No GitHub Actions run was observed for the latest commit at inspection time.
Static validation does not prove repository environment protection, credential validity, action integrity, Cloudflare deployment, hostname resolution, or served identity.
The primary C-001 deployment blocker remains external configuration of the cloudflare-research environment and successful dispatch of the deployment workflow.
Major-version action references remain mutable until exact upstream commit identities are independently verified and pinned.
falsification_route: Modify the gate to stop watching the deployment workflow, add credential access, or add a deployment command; the committed contract tests must fail. A successful hosted gate run must later produce the named JSON audit artifact.

claim_status.observed: The prior audit and tests were committed, while the deployment workflow did not invoke that audit in its listed contract-test step.
claim_status.inferred: An independent path-filtered gate reduces the chance that workflow-security regressions reach a credentialed manual deployment run unnoticed.
claim_status.proposed: After exact action commit identities are verified, pin the gate and deployment workflow action references.
claim_status.unresolved: Cloudflare account authorization, deployment URL, canonical hostname, deployed commit, and served research identity remain unproven.
